title: citrus grandis var. sabon
intro: Citrus grandis var. sabon, also known as the sabon or pomelo, is a variety of citrus fruit that grows on a tree native to Southeast Asia. The sabon tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of sabon include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Sabon can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and its juice can also be consumed fresh or dried for later use.
